title: Advanced Optimizations
description: Specifically picked mods to keep great quality and performace!
body:
Advanced Optimization (AO) contains very carefully picked optimization mods to __achieve highest FPS__ on any **NVIDIA GPU** Device.

**WARNING, THIS MODPACK WILL NOT WORK IF DO NOT HAVE AN NVIDIA GPU.**

Feel free to contact me on discord `doomwastaken` and give me suggestions for the modpack

## Mod Comparison

*PC Specs: GeForce RTX 2060 Ti, AMD Ryzen 5 4600H, 16GB RAM*

||Advanced Optimizations|Fabulously Optimized|Adrenaline|
|:---:|:------------------------:|:---------------------:|:----------:|
|Average|352 FPS|289 FPS|329 FPS|
|Highest|427 FPS|429 FPS| 412 FPS|
|Lowest|192 FPS|150 FPS| 181 FPS|

<details>
<summary>Used Mods</summary>

## Pure version:
*(Contains only optimization mods)*

- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Brings back Optifine's CIT
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Config screen API
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - Increases chunk performance
- [Don't Clear Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcch) - Saves chat history when leaving servers
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Limits FPS if Minecraft is unfocused
- [Dynamic Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fullbright) - Better brightness settings
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Uses async path-tracing to skip rendering blocks/entities that are not visible
- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) - Limits the HUD and GUI framerate
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Essential API for modding in Fabric
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Reduces memory usage
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - General rendering optimizations
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Additional rendering optimization mod for Sodium
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shaders
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - Optimizes networking stack
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Defers unnecessary initialization work for faster launching
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Another general-purpose optimization mod
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Mod menu
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes pixel gaps in item models
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases chat history to 16'384 (2^14)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Changes how culling is handled to improve performance
- [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - replacement rendering backend for sodium that uses nvidia only opengl extensions to increase fps by a significant amount
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Replaces Sodium's options screen
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Improves rendering performance and fixes graphical issues
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Extra options for Sodium.
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the light engine for performance
- [Too Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/tmp) - Rough client optimization mod to increase framerate in high player situations
- [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) - Stops tooltips that are too large to fit on the screen from running off the screen
- [Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) - Designed to improve performance at high playercounts

## QoL version:
*(Contains additional QoL mods, which may slightly reduce performance.)*

- Everything from Pure version
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food-related HUD improvements
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Dynamic lights
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Better player model animations in third-person
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Allows you to see a preview of a shulker box contents
- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie) - Item scrolling, inventory sorting, and other mouse wheel related inventory addons
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Efficient connected textures with Optifine parity

</details>
